executives.name: Dean Hanisch
executives.background: Mr. Hanisch has over 20 years of experience in the financial services industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets. He has held various senior management positions with several public and private companies.

executives.name: Robin Goad
executives.background: Mr. Goad is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He is the President and CEO of Fortune Minerals Limited and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits.

executives.name: Judith Mazvihwa-MacLean
executives.background: Ms. Mazvihwa-MacLean is a geologist and a mining executive with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held various senior management positions with several public and private companies and is currently the CFO of Fortune Minerals Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Dean Hanisch
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hanisch has over 20 years of experience in the financial services industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Robin Goad
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Goad is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He is the President and CEO of Fortune Minerals Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Goad
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Goad has over 25 years of experience in the financial services industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Harry Burgess
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Burgess is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He is a co-founder of Micon International Limited and has been involved in the evaluation and development of numerous mineral projects worldwide.

sources.source_description: Stria Lithium Inc. Official Website - Management & Directors Page
